positive: Minimalist abstract representation of a soaring mountain landscape at dawn. The composition features clean, stylized silhouettes of dramatic, layered peaks against a vibrant gradient sky of deep indigo, burnt orange, and soft lavender. The foreground includes delicate, abstract forms of wind-swept grasses and stylized stylized clouds, all rendered with high contrast and clean lines suitable for screen printing. The mood is ethereal, epic, and serene. Composition should be perfectly balanced and suitable for centering on a t-shirt. Vector art style, ultra-detailed, professional graphic design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logos, signatures, dirty, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photography, photorealistic
